name: Lead Generation
description: Multi-channel lead generation campaigns that fill your pipeline with qualified prospects ready to book
benefits: Get a predictable flow of qualified leads every week - no more feast or famine cycles
Only pay for results that matter - leads you can actually convert into paying customers
Multi-channel campaigns (Google, Facebook, SEO) working together to maximize lead volume
Complete lead management system - capture, qualify, and nurture leads until they book
pricing_model: Pay per lead or base + performance commission
ideal_for: Businesses ready to scale with consistent lead flow

name: Meta Ads
description: Facebook and Instagram advertising that reaches homeowners and property managers in your service area
benefits: Target homeowners in specific suburbs who need your services right now
Build brand recognition so customers call you first when they need work done
Retarget website visitors who didn't call - stay top-of-mind until they're ready to book
Lower cost per lead than Google Ads while building long-term brand awareness
pricing_model: Fixed investment or percentage of ad spend
ideal_for: Building brand awareness and generating consistent lead flow

name: Google Ads
description: Search advertising that captures high-intent customers actively searching for your services right now
benefits: Appear at the top of Google when customers search for your services in your area
Capture high-intent leads - people actively looking to hire someone today
Only pay when someone clicks - no wasted budget on people who aren't interested
Track every dollar spent and every lead generated - know exactly what you're getting for your money
ideal_for: Businesses wanting immediate visibility and qualified leads

name: Conversion Rate Optimisation
description: Turn more website visitors into phone calls and booked jobs without spending more on advertising
benefits: Get more leads from the same traffic - turn website visitors into phone calls and bookings
Reduce wasted ad spend by converting more of the clicks you're already paying for
A/B test what actually works for your customers - stop guessing, start knowing
Improve every touchpoint - from ad click to phone call to booked job
pricing_model: Fixed project or monthly optimization retainer
ideal_for: Businesses getting traffic but not enough conversions

name: Email Marketing
description: Stay top-of-mind with past customers and nurture leads who aren't ready to book yet
benefits: Turn one-time customers into repeat customers - stay in touch for their next project
Nurture leads who got a quote but didn't book - automated follow-up until they're ready
Seasonal promotions to past customers - fill slow periods with repeat business
Automated sequences that run on autopilot - set it up once, generate revenue for years
ideal_for: Building repeat business and nurturing leads

name: Strategy & Consulting
description: Expert marketing guidance for home services businesses without hiring a full-time marketing manager
benefits: Get a clear roadmap from where you are now to your revenue goals - no more guessing
Fix what's not working in your current marketing before spending more money
Expert guidance specific to home services - we know what works for your industry
Done-for-you or train your team - flexible support that fits your business model
ideal_for: Business owners who want strategic direction
